top_signals.title: A Claim to Lead, a Hesitation to Act: Germany’s New Military Strategy
top_signals.summary:
In the public perception, it seems like a big deal for Germany to publish a military strategy for the first time. But let me pour a little cold water on that. A form of military strategy has always existed. Where today we have a National Security Strategy paired with a military strategy and Plan for the Armed Forces, the past offered the White Paper, Defence Policy Guidelines, and the Bundeswehr concept, which spelled out the armed forces’ structure in more concrete terms. Yet even the new military strategy, released in late April, reads more as analysis than as a clear

The post A Claim to Lead, a Hesitation to Act: Germany’s New Military Strategy appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto lobby urges Congress to pass staking and mining tax bill as is
top_signals.summary: A trio of crypto lobby groups says a bill allowing staking and mining rewards to be taxed when they’re sold should be passed without further amendments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asia Stocks Fall From Record as Tech Rally Cools | The China Show 6/23/2026
top_signals.summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Haidi Stroud-Watts and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aluminum Leads Tumble in Metals as Tech Selloff Fuels Bear Mood
top_signals.summary: Aluminum tumbled by more than 4%, and other metals posted sharp declines, after a bearish turn for equities weighed on sentiment in commodities markets.

top_signals.title: Heineken Names Coffee CEO Oliveira to Lead Turnaround
top_signals.summary: Heineken NV appointed Rafael Oliveira chief executive officer, as the Dutch brewer breaks with habit by hiring an outsider to try to reverse a slump in demand.
